dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal applies to SHORT options selling positions only (direction=SHORT). VIX mapped to india_vix (closest available volatility indicator). EWMA(60, 0.95) approximated using ema_20 as the closest available exponential moving average; note that the specified decay factor and period cannot be exactly matched with available indicators, but ema_20 provides similar regime filtering behavior. Entry condition: sell options when VIX below its moving average. Exit condition: cover when VIX crosses above moving average. Target regimes indicate preference for low-volatility environments where short options strategies perform better.

source_rule_text: A trader should only sell options when the VIX is below its moving average, as this regime filter improves performance by avoiding high-volatility environments unfavorable to short option positions.
